text: Nationalist China: The government is attempting to reorganize the Chinese Nationalist irregulars in Burma into an effective military force capable of tactical missions. An important element in the Nationalist program for supplying and controlling the irregulars has been the transfer of junior officers and enlisted men with special-forces training from Taiwan to the Burma border area--possibly 1,000 this year. On 2 November Chiang Ching-kuo told a group of irregular commanders, then in Taiwan for orientation, that the Burma area would be the first line of counterattack against the mainland
